nodes.name: Trigger Colab Scoring
nodes.notes: Calls the Colab Enterprise API to create a notebook execution job. Requires a Google Service Account credential in n8n with roles: Colab Enterprise User, Storage Object Viewer.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS accounts_scored,
  MIN(last_scored_at) AS earliest_score,
  MAX(last_scored_at) AS latest_score
FROM accounts
WHERE last_scored_at >= (NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes');

UPDATE scoring_runs
SET status       = 'Completed',
    completed_at = NOW(),
    accounts_scored = {{ $('Validate Scores in DB').item.json.accounts_scored }},
    metrics = jsonb_build_object(
      'earliest_score', '{{ $('Validate Scores in DB').item.json.earliest_score }}',
      'latest_score',   '{{ $('Validate Scores in DB').item.json.latest_score }}',
      'tier_distribution', (
        SELECT jsonb_object_agg(risk_tier, cnt)
        FROM (
          SELECT risk_tier::TEXT, COUNT(*) AS cnt
          FROM accounts
          WHERE last_scored_at >= (NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes')
          GROUP BY risk_tier
        ) t
      )
    )
WHERE id = '{{ $('Load Config').item.json.scoringRunId }}';

UPDATE scoring_runs
SET status        = 'Failed',
    completed_at  = NOW(),
    error_message = 'Notebook completed but no scores were written to the database.'
WHERE id = '{{ $('Load Config').item.json.scoringRunId }}';

parameters.subject: =❌ Churn Scoring Failed — No scores written — {{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd') }}
parameters.html:
=

Nightly Scoring Run Failed

Run ID: {{ $('Load Config').item.json.scoringRunId }}

Started at: {{ $('Load Config').item.json.scoringRunStart }}

Failure reason: The Colab notebook execution completed successfully, but no scores were written to the database within the expected window.

What to check

  • Verify the scoring notebook's database connection settings
  • Check the notebook output in GCS: {{ $('Load Config').item.json.outputGcsPrefix }}/{{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd') }}
  • Verify Google Drive model artifacts are accessible
  • Review the scoring_runs table for details

This is an automated alert from the NovaSeat Churn Prevention system.

parameters.query:
UPDATE scoring_runs
SET status        = 'Failed',
    completed_at  = NOW(),
    error_message = 'Notebook execution failed. State: {{ $('Check Execution State').item.json.executionState }}. Error: {{ $('Check Execution State').item.json.error || "unknown" }}'
WHERE id = '{{ $('Load Config').item.json.scoringRunId }}';

parameters.subject: =❌ Churn Scoring Failed — Notebook error — {{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd') }}
parameters.html:
=

Nightly Scoring Run Failed

Run ID: {{ $('Load Config').item.json.scoringRunId }}

Started at: {{ $('Load Config').item.json.scoringRunStart }}

Execution state: {{ $('Check Execution State').item.json.executionState }}

Error: {{ $('Check Execution State').item.json.error || 'No details — check the execution job in Google Cloud Console.' }}

What to check

  • Open Colab Enterprise and inspect the execution job
  • Verify the runtime template {{ $('Load Config').item.json.runtimeTemplate }} is valid
  • Check service account permissions (Colab Enterprise User, Storage Object Viewer)

This is an automated alert from the NovaSeat Churn Prevention system.

parameters.query:
UPDATE scoring_runs
SET status        = 'Failed',
    completed_at  = NOW(),
    error_message = 'Colab API call failed. The notebook execution could not be started.'
WHERE id = '{{ $('Load Config').item.json.scoringRunId }}';

parameters.subject: =❌ Churn Scoring Failed — API error — {{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd') }}
parameters.html:
=

Nightly Scoring Run Failed

Run ID: {{ $('Load Config').item.json.scoringRunId }}

Started at: {{ $('Load Config').item.json.scoringRunStart }}

Failure reason: The Colab Enterprise API call failed. The notebook execution could not be started.

What to check

  • Verify the Google Service Account credential in n8n is valid and not expired
  • Check that the service account has the Colab Enterprise User role
  • Verify project ID ({{ $('Load Config').item.json.projectId }}) and location ({{ $('Load Config').item.json.location }})
  • Check n8n execution logs for HTTP response details

This is an automated alert from the NovaSeat Churn Prevention system.
